name: Creamy Golden Protein Cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the amaranth flour, millet flour, yellow corn flour, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add the sesame tahini to the bowl and mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Gradually add water to the mixture while stirring continuously with a wire whisk.
4. Place the bowl over low heat and simmer, stirring constantly to prevent lumps or burning.
5. Continue cooking until the mixture thickens and becomes creamy.
6. Once thickened, remove from heat and serve hot with milk (or soy milk) and your favorite sweetener.
